title: Attractiveness of Teacher Education: Surveys 2020
description: The survey studied the image and pulling power of teacher education programmes and teaching profession in Finland as perceived by upper secondary school students, students in teacher education, teacher educators and guidance counsellors working in upper secondary schools. Most questions were asked from all the four respondent groups. The data are part of a research project on the attractiveness of programmes leading to a teaching degree, conducted by the Finnish Institute for Educational Researc
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
